curation_notes: Patch commit found via squash-merged PR #67 on paritytech/libsecp256k1. The patch renamed Signature::parse to parse_overflowing and Signature::parse_slice to parse_overflowing_slice, then added new parse_standard and parse_standard_slice functions that check the overflow flag from Scalar::set_b32 and return Error::InvalidSignature when R or S exceeds the curve order. Only src/lib.rs was changed (plus test file tests/verify.rs). Vulnerability class integer-overflow confirmed: CWE-190 maps directly and the patch adds explicit overflow checks on scalar deserialization. Locations derived from the patch diff — the vulnerable functions are Signature::parse (line 461) and Signature::parse_slice (line 472) in the pre-patch commit.
